violations.text: The kitchen and storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to increase pest control. Establishment is to clean and sanitize all mouse droppings using appropriate means of sanitation. Establishment is to have pest control reports available to inspector New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2025
The gasket was milk chest #3 is in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Under the dishwasher, and in the bottom left corner of the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings under dishwasher and corner of kitchen using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidence by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings in the cafeteria line, and under equipment using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Per PIC, pest control is routinely coming once a week. Establishment is to continue on increasing pest control as frequently as needed and have a pest control report for next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue with increased pest control, establishment is to continue monitor for activity. Establishment is to continue to clean any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment must clean under milk case and book vending machine in cafeteria along with the floors of the cafeteria to remove any and all droppings. The room next to the storage room in the cafeteria must be cleaned to remove any and all droppings. Propers means of cleaning must be used to remove droppings from all areas. Pest control must be increased - a full evaluation of the establishment must be completed by licensed pest control company- Pest control reports must be available for inspector at time of re-inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the walk in cooler was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler door. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2023

The floor in the cafeteria, and in the back room area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to continue to inspect for evidence of pests, and is to clean any and all droppings. Establishment is to work with pest control to close points of entry, and to control pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment must clean droppings under all equipment, from floor in kitchen and cafeteria, from storage room and storage closet. Establishment must clean the perimeter of the kitchen and cafeteria to remove droppings. Establishment must increase pest control. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
The floor in the kitchen by the stove and refrigerator is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
